'''âg-k-l''' ('''kagakal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecstasise|ecstasise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecstasise|ecstasise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-k-l
|-
! Lemma
| kagakal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigakal|thigakal]] || [[word:jigakal|jigakal]] || [[word:shigakal|shigakal]] || [[word:kigakal|kigakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugakal|thuthugakal]] || [[word:jujugakal|jujugakal]] || [[word:shushugakal|shushugakal]] || [[word:kukugakal|kukugakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugakal|thugakal]] || [[word:jugakal|jugakal]] || [[word:shugakal|shugakal]] || [[word:kugakal|kugakal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugakal|thugakal]] || [[word:jugakal|jugakal]] || [[word:shugakal|shugakal]] || [[word:kugakal|kugakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegakal|thegakal]] || [[word:jegakal|jegakal]] || [[word:shegakal|shegakal]] || [[word:kegakal|kegakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogakal|thothogakal]] || [[word:jojogakal|jojogakal]] || [[word:shoshogakal|shoshogakal]] || [[word:kokogakal|kokogakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogakal|thogakal]] || [[word:jogakal|jogakal]] || [[word:shogakal|shogakal]] || [[word:kogakal|kogakal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogakal|thogakal]] || [[word:jogakal|jogakal]] || [[word:shogakal|shogakal]] || [[word:kogakal|kogakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgakal|thĂŠgakal]] || [[word:jĂŠgakal|jĂŠgakal]] || [[word:shĂŠgakal|shĂŠgakal]] || [[word:kĂŠgakal|kĂŠgakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagakal|thathagakal]] || [[word:jajagakal|jajagakal]] || [[word:shashagakal|shashagakal]] || [[word:kakagakal|kakagakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagakal|thagakal]] || [[word:jagakal|jagakal]] || [[word:shagakal|shagakal]] || [[word:kagakal|kagakal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagakal|thagakal]] || [[word:jagakal|jagakal]] || [[word:shagakal|shagakal]] || [[word:kagakal|kagakal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagakal|shagakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagakal|goshagakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagakal|gokishagakal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagakalnĂŒ|shagakalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagakalnknĂŒ|goshagakalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakalnĂŒ|gokishagakalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagakalshĂ«|shagakalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagakalnkshĂ«|goshagakalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagakalshĂ«|gokishagakalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakalro|shagakalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakalnkro|goshagakalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakalro|gokishagakalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakalmu|shagakalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakalnkmu|goshagakalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakalmu|gokishagakalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagakalsher|shagakalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagakalnksher|goshagakalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagakalsher|gokishagakalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagakalng|shagakalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagakalnkng|goshagakalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagakalng|gokishagakalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagakalya|shagakalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagakalnkya|goshagakalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagakalya|gokishagakalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagakalyam|shagakalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagakalnkyam|goshagakalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagakalyam|gokishagakalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakalnĂŒshĂ«|shagakalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagakalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagakalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakalnĂŒro|shagakalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakalnknĂŒro|goshagakalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakalnĂŒro|gokishagakalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakalnĂŒmu|shagakalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakalnknĂŒmu|goshagakalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakalnĂŒmu|gokishagakalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakalshĂ«nĂŒ|shagakalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagakalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagakalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakalshĂ«ro|shagakalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakalnkshĂ«ro|goshagakalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakalshĂ«ro|gokishagakalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakalshĂ«mu|shagakalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakalnkshĂ«mu|goshagakalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakalshĂ«mu|gokishagakalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakalronĂŒ|shagakalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakalnkronĂŒ|goshagakalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakalronĂŒ|gokishagakalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakalroshĂ«|shagakalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakalnkroshĂ«|goshagakalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakalroshĂ«|gokishagakalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagakalromu|shagakalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagakalnkromu|goshagakalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagakalromu|gokishagakalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagakalmunĂŒ|shagakalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagakalnkmunĂŒ|goshagakalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagakalmunĂŒ|gokishagakalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagakalmushĂ«|shagakalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagakalnkmushĂ«|goshagakalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagakalmushĂ«|gokishagakalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagakalmuro|shagakalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagakalnkmuro|goshagakalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagakalmuro|gokishagakalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
